findings.title: Unconditional test for control characters on older Go versions
findings.rationale: The diff removed the Go version check that ensured json.Marshal correctly escaped \b and \f (required for valid JSON). On Go versions <1.22, json.Marshal("\b\f") produces invalid JSON (raw control characters), causing gjson to fail parsing. The test now runs unconditionally, breaking on older Go versions.
findings.suggestion: Reintroduce version check to skip test on Go <1.22

evidence.ref: Go JSON encoding requires \b/\f escaping (json.Marshal behavior)
